subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification, sanctified beyond comprehension and knowledge, befit the Self-Subsisting Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت قیوم را حمد و ثنای مقدس از ادراک و علوم لایق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @Hands of the Cause, @prayer for the departed, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
